japanese.name: Japanese
japanese.instructions: Speak naturally in standard Japanese. Use clear pronunciation suitable for a beginner learning Japanese.

spanish.name: Spanish
spanish.instructions: Speak naturally in standard Spanish. Use clear pronunciation suitable for a beginner learning Spanish.

french.name: French
french.instructions: Speak naturally in standard French. Use clear pronunciation suitable for a beginner learning French.

vietnamese.name: Vietnamese
vietnamese.instructions: Speak naturally in southern Vietnamese (Saigon dialect). Use a clear southern accent and natural pacing. Keep pronunciation clear for learners.
